_comment: NPC: Black Market Hei (黑市黑). INFERRED: Smuggler who cynically exploits the city's fortune-telling culture. Sells 'fate-changing' items at premium prices.. Derivation: I = INFERRED.
name: Black Market Hei
personality: paranoid, cynical, mocks the divination culture
note: INFERRED: Smuggler who cynically exploits the city's fortune-telling culture. Sells 'fate-changing' items at premium prices.
initiation_lines: You found the tunnels. The diviners say there are no tunnels. Funny how heaven's will aligns with the governor's convenience.
I sell things the market cannot. Rare materials, forbidden knowledge. The diviners call it 'interfering with fate.' I call it business.
Gao Qiming is the only real seer in this city. Everyone else is selling snake oil. Including me. But at least I am honest about it.
Stay off the main tunnel past midnight. That is when the governor's cultivators make their deposits. Fate will not save you if they catch you.

sect_tasks.description: Hei grins: 'Gold and emeralds. I have buyers who pay premium for fate-altering materials. Bring me goods and I will give you a cut — and a map of places the diviners cannot see.'
Hei whispers: 'Extending toward the warehouse. Iron and cobblestone. Discreetly. The governor's guards cannot know — fate has not foretold this.'
